name: Aldershot Athletics Track (Military Stadium)
metaTitle: Aldershot Athletics Track (Military Stadium) | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Aldershot Military Stadium athletics track.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: The stadium is primarily used by the British Army and affiliated clubs. It is not a standard pay-and-play facility; access is generally via bookings or organized club sessions.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is managed via club memberships (such as Aldershot, Farnham & District AC) or specific facility bookings. Contact the Garrison Sports Centre for inquiries.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A floodlit, 8-lane 400m synthetic track. Please note that field event availability may be restricted during the winter months (Sept–April) due to football use.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Dedicated on-site parking is available at the Military Stadium, with additional overflow parking within the wider Aldershot Garrison sports complex.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: View facility details and contact information via the Aldershot Garrison Sports Centre.
